tool.read_file.desc: Read a file's content from the local file system
tool.write_file.desc: Write plain text content to a file
tool.edit_file.desc: Edit a text file by replacing a specific string
tool.file_system_overview.desc: Get an overview of the local file system
tool.memory.desc: Manage memory in conversations. Supports add, delete, and search
tool.variable.desc: Manage variables in conversations. Supports get, set, delete, list, and search
panel.api_settings.desc: Configure LLM API connection parameters and model selection
panel.embedding_api_config.desc: Configure the OpenAI style embedding API connection settings
panel.qdrant_api_config.desc: Configure the Qdrant API connection settings
panel.dyn_prompt.desc: Manage and edit DynPrompt sets and prompts
panel.example.desc: This is an example plugin panel
panel.file_system.desc: Configure file system AllowList and BanList access rules
panel.dataset_export.desc: Export conversations with optional context modifier application
panel.regex_modifier.desc: Configure Regex sets for the Regex Render Modifier
panel.sub_agent_config.desc: Configure sub-agents for advanced Agentic workflows
panel.agent_variable.desc: Manage global variables for the current agent
panel.variable.desc: Manage variables in conversations, supports Agent and Chat scopes
node.api_select.desc: Choose which API configuration to use for generation
node.append_chat_messages.desc: Append chat history messages from SharedState into context fragments
node.call_preset.desc: Load and execute a preset from Generation Manager
node.dyn_prompt.desc: Evaluate DynPrompt trigger rules and inject matching prompts
node.merge_fragments.desc: Merge all context fragments into a single fragment with the selected role
node.message_print_latest.desc: Print the latest fragment's message content to console
node.message_print.desc: Print context fragments as JSON to console
node.message_print_v2.desc: Print context fragments with ANSI role-based coloring to console
node.print.desc: Print a template to console with {time} and {total_len} macro support
node.st_style_macro.desc: Replace {{user}} and {{char}} macros in fragment message contents
node.tool_preset.desc: Load a tool preset from ToolManager
prop.call_node.preset_id.hint: ID of the generation preset to inline
prop.dyn_prompt.set_name.hint: Name of the DynPromptSet to use. Leave empty to use all sets
prop.dyn_prompt.role.hint: Role for injected fragments (system / user / assistant)
prop.fragment.content.hint: The text content to inject into the context
prop.fragment_trim.token_budget.hint: Max tokens before trimming from head
prop.fragment_trim.count.hint: Messages to keep in LatestN mode
prop.memory_retrieve.recent_messages.hin: Number of recent messages used for memory search
prop.merge_fragments.target_role.hint: Role assigned to the merged fragment
prop.message_print_v2.ignore_null_proper: Skip properties whose value is null or empty
prop.message_print_v2.colorize_tool_args: Apply JSON syntax coloring to tool call arguments
prop.sequence.repeat.hint: Number of times to repeat the sequence
prop.sub_agent.task.hint: Optional task message appended before generation. Leave empty to continue parent conversation
prop.sub_agent.output_mode.hint: LastMessage, FullJson, or None. Overrides config if set
prop.tool_preset.preset_name.hint: Leave empty to use the default preset, or enter a preset name to match
editor.call_node.label: Preset
editor.call_node.no_presets: No presets found. Create one in the Generation Manager.
